title: AN ACT FIXING THE SALARIES OF OFFICERS AND EMPLOYEES OF THE COURT OF TAX APPEALS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES.

chunks.text:
S. No. 879 H. No. 17349 / 66 OG No. 16, 3979 (April 20, 1970)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6063, August 04, 1969 ]

AN ACT FIXING THE SALARIES OF OFFICERS AND EMPLOYEES OF THE COURT OF TAX APPEALS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES.

.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Any provision of existing law to the contrary notwithstanding, the annual salaries of the Judges and employees of the Court of Tax Appeals occupying positions mentioned in this Section, with their corresponding item numbers before their positions as indicated in Republic Act Numbered Fifty-one hundred seventy, the General Appropriations Act for the fiscal year 1967-68, shall be fixed as follows:

Office of the Judges

One Presiding Judge

P24.000.00

Two Associate Judges at P23,000.00

40,000.00

Three private secretary-stenographers at P7,200.00 each

21,600.00

Office of the Clerk of Court

One Clerk of Court (administrative officer, reporter and sheriff)

14,000.00

Budget and Personnel Section

One budget officer and administrative assistant

10,200.00

One budget assistant

8,400.00

One clerk

4,200.00

One auditing examiner

3,960.00

Court Service Section

One deputy clerk of court

9,600.00

One bilingual stenographer

9,000.00

One bilingual stenographer

8,400.00

One court stenographer

8,400.00

One court stenographer

7,800.00

One court stenographer

7,200.00

One deputy sheriff

4,500.00

One bailiff

3,300.00

Cash and Property Section

One court stenographer

7,800.00

One court stenographer

7,200.00

One deputy sheriff

4,500.00

One bailiff

3,300.00

Cash and Property Section

One cashier-disbursing and property officer

8,400.00

One security guard

4,200.00

Records, Docket and General Service Section

One records and docket officer

9,000.00

One bilingual stenographer

8,400.00

One chief janitor, with free quarters if required to live in the court's premises

3,600.00

One janitor-messenger

3,120.00

Legal and Technical Staff

One chief of legal and technical staff

14,000.00

One assistant chief of legal and technical staff

13,200.00

One clerk-stenographer

4,200.00

Legal and Library Section

One attorney (researcher)

P8.400.00

One attorney (researcher)

7,200.00

One attorney (researcher)

6,000.00

One attorney (researcher and Library custodian)

6,000.00

One attorney (researcher)

5,400.00

Technical Assistance Section

One senior attorney

10,200.00

One senior attorney

10,200.00

One certified public accountant

10,200.00

SEC. 2. Upon the effectivity of this Act, the respective Judge and employee actually occupying any of the positions herein provided shall be entitled to the salary provided for said position without need of new appointment.

SEC. 3. In addition to such sums as may be provided in the General Appropriations Act for the fiscal year 1968-1969, there is hereby appropriated, out of any funds in the national treasury not otherwise appropriated, such sums as may be necessary to carry out the provisions of this Act:

Provided,

That if savings are realized by the Court of Tax Appeals from its annual appropriations for the said fiscal year 1968-1969 and subsequent fiscal years, the adjustment of salaries provided for by this Act shall be implemented out of these savings. Thereafter, the same shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 4. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, August 4, 1969.
